name: UAV Realistic Fault Dataset
readme_excerpt: # UAV-Realistic-Fault-Dataset This data set is released with the publication **Towards a Reliable and Lightweight Onboard Fault Detection in Autonomous Unmanned Aerial Vehicles**, which is accepted at [ICRA 2023](https://www.icra2023.org/). Propeller are an
note: Indoor takeoff-to-landing missions with 0-4 broken propellers; script samples up to 3 SensorCombined JSONL files, 1 AudioBuffer JSONL file, and 2 raw Imu JSONL files per class.

name: UAV realistic fault class 0
note: Class label equals number of broken propellers according to the dataset README.

name: UAV realistic fault class 0 Imu sample
note: Raw Imu JSONL messages report frame_id-specific x/z angular velocity and linear acceleration without timestamps; use as a local vibration/sensor-layout amplitude source, not a rate-calibrated time-series summary.

name: PADRE UAV propeller-fault measurement dataset
readme_excerpt: # PADRE - UAV_measurement_data The repository contains sensory data from drones collected during flights with different types of propeller failures. Measurements from accelerometers, gyroscopes, microphones and other sensors were collected
note: GitHub repository with 3DR Solo and Parrot Bebop 2 UAV actuator-fault sensor data. Only a small preprocessed FFT subset is sampled here to keep the validation script lightweight.
file_name_pattern: The folder contains data obtained from the discrete wavelet transformation (DWT). file name: UAV_DWT_sensor_axes_sensorRange_windowLength_waveletType_rangeStar

name: PADRE 3DR Solo healthy_all_rotors accel X
note: PADRE preprocessed FFT feature matrix from 3DR Solo accelerometer axis file; values are normalized/features, not raw acceleration units.

note: PADRE preprocessed FFT feature matrix from 3DR Solo accelerometer axis file; values are normalized/features, not raw acceleration units.

name: DJI Mini 2 propeller damage vibration Figshare dataset
note: Figshare description lists five Excel files recorded during repeatable indoor hover with a centrally mounted ADXL335 triaxial accelerometer and NI USB-6008 DAQ.

name: healthy
note: Full-file time-domain and Welch vector-PSD summary from Figshare Excel acceleration data; two-blade RPM assumes the dominant peak is blade-pass frequency.
header: Time (s) | X Acceleration | Y Acceleration | Z Acceleration

name: damaged_bottom_right
note: Full-file time-domain and Welch vector-PSD summary from Figshare Excel acceleration data; two-blade RPM assumes the dominant peak is blade-pass frequency.
header: Time (s) | X Acceleration | Y Acceleration | Z Acceleration

name: racingQuad blade-pass versus DJI Mini 2 dataset bandwidth
note: The DJI Mini 2 dataset is useful for fault-vibration signatures, but its 1024 Hz sample rate cannot directly resolve this project's racingQuad 3-blade hover blade-pass frequency.

name: racingQuad blade-pass alias at DJI Mini 2 sample rate
note: Sampling alias check for using the DJI Mini 2 vibration data as a frequency reference. Direct BPF comparison is valid only when the true blade-pass frequency is below Nyquist.
